response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development, with experience in AI-agent infrastructure and relevant technologies such as TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms. They have also demonstrated leadership and technical expertise in various roles.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and relevant technologies
Strong background in software development with diverse tech stack
Demonstrated leadership and technical expertise in various roles
concerns: Lack of direct experience in GenAI or RAG architectures
No explicit mention of experience with vector databases
Location in Lagos, Nigeria, might be a logistical challenge
